
        if (info.m_xm_hyper_exploit) {
            send_log_normal("Authenticating 2nd DA(XIAOMI_HyperOS)  : \n");

            qbyte dev_fw_info = {0};
            if (!SendDevCtrl(MTK::GET_DEV_FW_INFO, dev_fw_info))
                return(0);

            qbyte remote_sla = qbyte::fromHex("");
            if (!send_param(MTK::MTKRET04))
                return(0);
            if (!write32(MTK::DEVICE_CTRL))
                return(0);
            if (!readack(MTK::MTKRET00))
                return(0);
            if (!send_param(MTK::MTKRET04))
                return(0);
            if (!write32(MTK::SET_REMOTE_SEC_POLICY))
                return(0);
            if (!readack(MTK::MTKRET00))
                return(0);
            if (!send_param(remote_sla.size()))
                return(0);
            if (!this->write(remote_sla))
                return(0);
            if (!readack(MTK::MTKRET00))
                return(0);
        }
